title: 消えた灯と夏の影
description:
"See you in front of the goldfish scooping stall!"On the night of a summer festival, the protagonist, Hotaru, becomes separated from her best friend, Akari, in the crowded streets.

When she returns to the place where they promised to meet, Akari is nowhere to be found.

Before she realizes it, Hotaru finds herself in a mysterious world where the memories of Spring, Summer, Autumn, and Winter have taken form.

As she journeys through the four seasons, Hotaru uncovers forgotten memories and slowly draws closer to the truth hidden behind that summer festival.

"Akari... where are you?"

Game Features■ A Japanese-Style Story Adventure Through the Four SeasonsTravel through worlds shaped by the memories of Spring, Summer, Autumn, and Winter as you uncover the truth behind the events that changed two girls' lives.

Experience a story-driven adventure where exploration, conversations, and light puzzle-solving gradually reveal the full picture.

■ Multiple Endings Based on Your ChoicesThe story changes depending on your decisions and how thoroughly you explore.

Will you find hope... or be left with regret?

Discover one of seven unique endings and uncover the truth for yourself.

■ A Nostalgic and Mysterious Japanese WorldExplore a quiet, nostalgic world filled with beautiful scenery, subtle psychological horror, and emotional storytelling.

Unravel the memories of two girls in an unforgettable journey.

■ Solo DevelopmentThis game is entirely created by a single developer, including the scenario, artwork, maps, and music.

■ Estimated Playtime2–3 hours
description_short: Journey through the four seasons, uncover lost memories, and reveal the truth hidden behind a summer festival in this Japanese-style story adventure. Your choices and exploration will lead to one of seven unique endings.
